title: Responsive Web Design Certification
description: This course teaches the fundamentals of HTML and CSS, including modern layout, design, accessibility, and responsive web development. You'll build practical projects and gain the skills to create professional, user-friendly webpages.

title: Claude 101
description: Learn how to use Claude for everyday work tasks, understand core features, and explore resources for more advanced learning on other topics.

title: Claude Code 101
description: Learn how to use Claude Code effectively in your daily development workflow.
